description: Use this API to purge specified buses and all branches connected to them from the working case (activity EXTR). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = extr(sid, all, status)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined (when all is 0). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying They are used to control subsystem removal options. A value of 0 means the option is not enabled. A value of 1 means the option is enabled. (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: remove generator entries for out-of-service plants (0 by default).
change codes of boundary buses (0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
